ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date_game" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home or away) */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (win or loss) */,
  "game_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "opponent_team_name" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "game_quarter_scores" TEXT /* Scores for each quarter in a comma-separated format */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (Scheduled, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game associated with the statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "drb" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds by the player */,
  "orb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds by the player */,
  "fg" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "fg3" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals made */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Total field goal attempts */,
  "ft" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throw attempts */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls committed */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating for the player in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers_by_opponent" INTEGER /* Turnovers caused by the player */,
  "second_chance_points" INTEGER /* Points scored from second-chance opportunities */,
  "fast_break_points" INTEGER /* Points scored from fast breaks */,
  "points_in_paint" INTEGER /* Points scored in the paint area */,
  "three_point_attempts" INTEGER /* Three-point attempts made by the player */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "fantasy_points" INTEGER /* Fantasy points scored by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* The name of the team the player belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins for the player in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses for the player in the season */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's position (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Draft round */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "college" TEXT /* Player's college (if applicable) */,
  "years_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the player has been in the league */,
  "current_salary" INTEGER /* Player's current salary */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)
column_names: Date when the game was played
Location of the game (home or away)
Outcome of the game (win or loss)
Scores for each quarter in a comma-separated format
Number of spectators at the game
Name of the referee for the game

Indicates if the game went into overtime

Reference to the game associated with the statistics

Plus-minus rating for the player in the game
Number of minutes played by the player
Points scored in the paint area
Three-point attempts made by the player
Fantasy points scored by the player
